channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: 22 Dead As Truck Carrying Refugees From Pakistan Overturns In Afghanistan

media:content.media:description: The passengers were among thousands of Afghans who recently returned from Pakistan.

item.description: Among the dead were 10 children and five women, and the injured were taken to hospitals in Nangarhar.
item.content:encoded: Among the dead were 10 children and five women, and the injured were taken to hospitals in Nangarhar.

item.title: Netanyahu Worried Trump May Strike A "Bad Interim Deal" With Iran: Report

media:content.media:description: Israeli officials say Netanyahu has pushed for strikes on Iran's oil facilities.

item.description: For Israel, concerns remain that any emerging deal may leave out key issues such as Iran’s enriched uranium stockpile, its missile programme and support for regional proxy groups.
item.content:encoded: For Israel, concerns remain that any emerging deal may leave out key issues such as Iran’s enriched uranium stockpile, its missile programme and support for regional proxy groups.

item.title: Broke Pakistan Is Burning A Million Dollars On Image Makeover In The US

media:content.media:description: Amid domestic headwinds, many analysts believe that 'image makeover' will be an uphill task.

item.description: Pakistan has signed a $1.3 million lobbying deal in Washington to refurbish its global image and push its strategic interests in US policy
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has signed a $1.3 million lobbying deal in Washington to refurbish its global image and push its strategic interests in US policy

item.title: US' U-Turn On Green Card Rules, Most Immigrants Won't Have To Leave America

media:content.media:description: DHS said on Friday that there had been no broad policy change.

item.description: The US Department of Homeland Security has clarified that most immigrants applying for green cards will not need to leave the United States while their applications are processed.
item.content:encoded: The US Department of Homeland Security has clarified that most immigrants applying for green cards will not need to leave the United States while their applications are processed.

item.title: "Rightful Alarm In Asia": Top Trump Aide's Warning On China Military Build-Up
item.description: Pete Hegseth stressed that Washington did not seek "needless confrontation in the region".
item.content:encoded: Pete Hegseth stressed that Washington did not seek "needless confrontation in the region".

item.title: 9 With Links To Pak's ISI, Dawood Ibrahim Arrested, Were Planning Attacks In Delhi, Mumbai

media:content.media:description: A large quantity of ammunition and weapons was also recovered from their possession

item.description: The Delhi Police's Special Cell said the accused are residents of Delhi, Mumbai, and Punjab, and some are foreign nationals.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1106325/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The Delhi Police's Special Cell said the accused are residents of Delhi, Mumbai, and Punjab, and some are foreign nationals.

item.title: As The War Rages In Iran, Tensions Brew In Other Parts Of The World

media:content.media:description: Nuclear push, unpredictable conflicts are being witnessed in the Eastern Hemisphere.

item.description: North Korea's nuclear defiance, a drone strike in Romania, China's silo expansion and Kazakhstan's offer to store Tehran's uranium stockpile present themselves as multiple flashpoints.
item.content:encoded: North Korea's nuclear defiance, a drone strike in Romania, China's silo expansion and Kazakhstan's offer to store Tehran's uranium stockpile present themselves as multiple flashpoints.

item.title: US Sanctions Iranian Buyers Of Military Technology
item.description: The United States announced Friday that it is "dismantling a sophisticated Iranian network" used to...
item.content:encoded: The United States announced Friday that it is "dismantling a sophisticated Iranian network" used to...

item.title: Trivia Champ, Helpful Grandfather Among Washington Tank Collapse Victims

media:content.media:description: The recovery of victims has been slow and methodical.

item.description: The collapse expelled a flood of caustic chemicals powerful enough to blow out building walls and overturn pickup trucks at the site.
item.content:encoded: The collapse expelled a flood of caustic chemicals powerful enough to blow out building walls and overturn pickup trucks at the site.

item.title: ICE Allows Deported Mother To Return To US For Her 3-Year-Old Son's Funeral

media:content.media:description: Orlin Josue Hernandez Reyes, who was living with his uncle, was found murdered

item.description: The 3-year-old was killed by his own relative after his mother was deported from the US in January this year.
item.content:encoded: The 3-year-old was killed by his own relative after his mother was deported from the US in January this year.

item.title: Epstein Aide Ghislaine Maxwell Should "Die In Prison": Ex-US Attorney Told Lawmakers

media:content.media:description: Maxwell is currently serving a 20-year sentence

item.description: Maxwell was a longtime associate of Epstein, the US financier and convicted sex offender, who died by suicide in jail in 2019.
item.content:encoded: Maxwell was a longtime associate of Epstein, the US financier and convicted sex offender, who died by suicide in jail in 2019.

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: Trump's Meet With Aides Ends Without "Final Determination"
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: UAE Struck Dozens Of Targets In Iran With US And Israel Help: Report

media:content.media:description: A number of reports in recent weeks have highlighted growing UAE-Israel coordination during the war.

item.description: The report, quoting people in the know, points to a deeper involvement than was previously known in the air campaign led by the US and Israel.
item.content:encoded: The report, quoting people in the know, points to a deeper involvement than was previously known in the air campaign led by the US and Israel.

item.title: Indian Staff At US Hotel Had Sex With Trafficked Teen For Cheaper Room Rates, Jailed

media:content.media:description: Kavankumar Patel worked at the AmericInn Hotel

item.description: Kavankumar Patel, a resident of Gujarat, was an employee at a hotel in Omaha and assaulted the girl in January last year.
item.content:encoded: Kavankumar Patel, a resident of Gujarat, was an employee at a hotel in Omaha and assaulted the girl in January last year.

item.title: Blue Origin Rocket Explosion Is Bad News For Both Jeff Bezos And NASA

media:content.media:description: The New Glenn rocket will remain grounded while the investigation is conducted.

item.description: Space exploration is filled with setbacks, but the spectacular explosion of Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket on Thursday night marked a significant blow to not only the company, which was founded by billionaire Jeff Bezos, but also NASA, with the...
item.content:encoded: Space exploration is filled with setbacks, but the spectacular explosion of Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket on Thursday night marked a significant blow to not only the company, which was founded by billionaire Jeff Bezos, but also NASA, with the...

item.title: What To Know About Manhattanhenge, New York's Sunset Spectacle

media:content.media:description: Manhattanhenge happens about three weeks before and after the summer solstice.

item.description: The traditional viewing spots are along the city's broad east-west thoroughfares: 14th Street, 23rd Street, 34th Street, 42nd Street and 57th Street.
item.content:encoded: The traditional viewing spots are along the city's broad east-west thoroughfares: 14th Street, 23rd Street, 34th Street, 42nd Street and 57th Street.

item.title: No Visibility, Narrow Tunnels: 3-Nation Laos Cave Rescue Team Faces Hurdles

media:content.media:description: The villagers had reportedly entered the cave last week to look for valuable minerals.

item.description: Rescue teams had pumped water out of the flooded cave's passages, but a morning rainstorm complicated their work.
item.content:encoded: Rescue teams had pumped water out of the flooded cave's passages, but a morning rainstorm complicated their work.

item.title: Tomatoes Become Latest Symbol Of America's Affordability Squeeze

media:content.media:description: US tariffs collected on tomatoes ballooned from just $16,424 in 2024 to nearly $4.6 million.

item.description: Prices for those red orbs have soared more than any other food product over the past year to cement a spot as one of the consumer headaches du jour.
item.content:encoded: Prices for those red orbs have soared more than any other food product over the past year to cement a spot as one of the consumer headaches du jour.

item.title: Russian Spies Aggressively Seek Western Technology As Sanctions Bite

media:content.media:description: Moscow is also trying to steal technology to help it keep pace or give it an edge.

item.description: Four years of international sanctions have hampered Moscow's ability to procure machinery, technology and research from Europe.
item.content:encoded: Four years of international sanctions have hampered Moscow's ability to procure machinery, technology and research from Europe.

item.title: Canadian Poison Seller Pleads Guilty To Aiding Suicides, Avoids Murder Trial

media:content.media:description: Canadian prosecutors had charged him with 14 counts of murder and 14 counts of aiding suicide.

item.description: The Canadian man who sold poison to distressed people worldwide pleaded guilty on Friday to 14 counts of aiding suicide but avoided a murder trial, an outcome one...
item.content:encoded: The Canadian man who sold poison to distressed people worldwide pleaded guilty on Friday to 14 counts of aiding suicide but avoided a murder trial, an outcome one...
